title: Pt.1 Decision Making: 101 #shorts
description:
#shorts 
Making better decisions | Part 1: You can almost always *bear the ‘How’ of something if you know the ‘Why.’ ✨🧿

If you have sat down with yourself/taken enough action to deeply understand your ‘reason for doing’ what you are doing, you will notice that making decisions, big and small start coming easier to you. 💯

You are able to discern which decision is in alignment with your ‘WHY’ and which is Not. ☀️
.
.
.
#mentalmodel #selfgrowth #personaldevelopment #growthmindset #perspective #decisionmaking #decisionfatigue
